title: Nocturnal Dweller
description: You will be haunted by the Nocturnal Dweller, a long critter that will appear in your world once every certain amount of time.
body:
With the installation of this mod you will have a new creature named **Nocturnal Dweller**, which will have only one goal - to saturate the bodies of players and wolves.

![Dweller's Head](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04ac97fe07f29ed859dceabb1093783fa8cd9239.png)

This creature has a growth on its head consisting of a phantom membrane, which you will get when you kill **Nocturnal Dweller**

[Dweller Trend]
